_human_review.notes: Project owner instructed Codex to mark the SA Stage B generated/reconciled tests as approved for internal/project benchmarking after manual review on 2026-06-05. This is not legal advice, external counsel review, or procurement-grade legal approval; candidate labels remain separate from locked recall baselines.

_label_note: AUTO-LABELED by LLM. Spot-check before refreshing recall.lock.json. Lock updates must include this provenance in --reason per item 16.
_label_tier_note: SA Stage B cleanup: must_detect is the strict detector-aligned benchmark tier; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-labeled statutory coverage for gap discovery. ideal_must_detect is not a locked recall baseline. Stage B labels are project-owner approved for internal benchmarking.

_label_warning_resolution.reason: SA Stage B strict tier was rebuilt from deterministic strict-mode engine findings; raw Azure auto-label warnings no longer describe active must_detect labels. Broader statutory coverage remains in ideal_must_detect for gap review.

_strict_reconciliation.basis: SA Stage B auto-label strict tier was reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine findings; original auto-label breadth is preserved in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. This is internal benchmark cleanup, not legal advice or procurement-grade review.
_strict_reconciliation.strict_source: PreSendReviewEngine.review(..., review_profile='strict') after narrowed SA/US Stage B detector precision fixes

_strict_runtime_reconciliation.reason: items 1-3 deterministic detector breadth strict-label reconciliation

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Transaction: Proposed acquisition by Investor of 22% of the issued shares of the Company and a strategic commercial agreement for tokenization of renewable energy certificates and carbon offsets.

Purchase Price: SAR 148,000,000 cash at closing plus SAR 22,000,000 earn-out linked to ESG/climate KPIs (scope 1–3 reporting coverage and RECs volume), subject to CMA reporting of related-party dealings where applicable.

Cyber Incident Warranty: Company represents no material cyber incident since 1447H-01-01; any non-public breach of customer wallets or key-management systems prior to announcement triggers a SAR 15,000,000 price adjustment or termination.

Crypto/DPT Licensing: Company will maintain operation within the Saudi regulatory sandbox and will not launch any stablecoin, exchange token, or DPT offering without CMA/SAMA no-objection and prior Investor consent.
Governance: Investor gets one board seat and one observer at Company; reserved matters include cybersecurity budget, custody architecture, climate-reporting methodology, and any token issuance.

Educational/Marketing Carve-out: Company’s public blog may use the terms “crypto”, “ESG”, and “breach” in general educational content and brand awareness campaigns that do not reference this transaction or any non-public events.
cross-border transfer of PDPL-regulated personal data to an EU-hosted virtual data room

Transaction: Proposed acquisition by Investor of 22% of the issued shares of the Company and a strategic commercial agreement for tokenization of renewable energy certificates and carbon offsets.
Purchase Price: SAR 148,000,000 cash at closing plus SAR 22,000,000 earn-out linked to ESG/climate KPIs (scope 1–3 reporting coverage and RECs volume), subject to CMA reporting of related-party dealings where applicable.
Conditions Precedent: CMA non-objection, completion of cyber and regulatory due diligence, and SDAIA permit for cross-border transfer of PDPL-regulated personal data to an EU-hosted virtual data room.
Cyber Incident Warranty: Company represents no material cyber incident since 1447H-01-01; any non-public breach of customer wallets or key-management systems prior to announcement triggers a SAR 15,000,000 price adjustment or termination.
Crypto/DPT Licensing: Company will maintain operation within the Saudi regulatory sandbox and will not launch any stablecoin, exchange token, or DPT offering without CMA/SAMA no-objection and prior Investor consent.
Confidentiality and MNPI: Parties acknowledge possession of non-public issuer information; handling shall comply with CMA Market Conduct Regulations, with an insider list maintained by Compliance naming wall-crossed individuals and timestamps.
Information Barriers: Investor shall enforce Chinese walls between investment banking and research/asset management teams; only approved deal team may access the data room and MNPI.
Trading Blackout: Investor imposes a blackout on trading its own Tadawul-listed shares from signing until public announcement and during any closed periods as per CMA and Tadawul rules.
Tipping and Selective Disclosure: No market sounding or disclosure to potential co-investors unless pre-cleared by Compliance and the recipients are wall-crossed and added to the insider list.
Governance: Investor gets one board seat and one observer at Company; reserved matters include cybersecurity budget, custody architecture, climate-reporting methodology, and any token issuance.
KYC and PDPL: KYC data for key managers (e.g., Mr. Saleh Al-Harbi, Iqama ending 3842; Dr. Rasha Al-Mutairi, National ID ending 9051) will be processed on a need-to-know basis, with data minimization, masking, and consent per PDPL.
Educational/Marketing Carve-out: Company’s public blog may use the terms “crypto”, “ESG”, and “breach” in general educational content and brand awareness campaigns that do not reference this transaction or any non-public events.
